ru-RU.CAPLINE_GEO_ALIGNED: Выровненный по Геометрии Линии Заглавных Букв
ru-RU.ERROR_THIS_TEXT_INDEX: Unable to load text data at index {0}
ru-RU.MISC_DEVELOPER: Square3ang & Kkitut. Display everything as you wish. Thank you for being with Overlayer.
ru-RU.NAME: Имя
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_ABSMAXXACCURACY: The highest achievable Absolute Max XAccuracy in the current tile(Excluding checkpoints)
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_ACTUALPROGRESS: Current Actual Progress based on time
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_ARTISTRAW: Composer of the song (with rich tags)
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_ATTEMPTS:
Shows Attempts.
Only works on CLS and official levels.
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_COLORRANGE: You can adjust the color from any color to any color you want based on a specific tag. Use with <color>.
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_CT: Current Too Early + Current Too Late
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_CV: Current Very Early + Current Very Late
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_DEATHS: The total number of planet explosions on the current map
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_DEFAULTTEXTCOLOR: Default text color of the level
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_DEFAULTTEXTSHADOWCOLOR: Default text shadow color of the level
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_DIFFICULTYRAW: Fixed difficulty return value regardless of language setting
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_EASEDVALUE: When the tag value changes, the tag value changes according to the speed.
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_EDITORPITCH: Pitch set in the LevelEditor (displayed as 1 when 100%)
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_FRAMETIME: Time difference between the previous frame and the current frame in ms
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_GCMEMALLOCRATE: Shows the allocation rate of memory by the Garbage Collector in MB per tick
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_GCMEMALLOCRATEGB: Shows the allocation rate of memory by the Garbage Collector in GB per tick
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_GCMEMALLOCRATEKB: Shows the allocation rate of memory by the Garbage Collector in KB per tick
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_GCMEMUSAGE: Shows the total memory used by the Garbage Collector in MB
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_GCMEMUSAGEGB: Shows the total memory used by the Garbage Collector in GB
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_GCMEMUSAGEKB: Shows the total memory used by the Garbage Collector in KB
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_ISAUTOENABLED: Displays true if auto is enabled, false otherwise
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_ISNOFAILENABLED: Displays true if No-fail Mode is enabled, false if disabled
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_ISOLDAUTOENABLED: Displays true if Old Auto is enabled, false if disabled
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_ISPRACTICEMODEENABLED: Displays true if practice mode is enabled, false otherwise
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_ISSPEEDTRIALENABLED:
Displays true if Speed Trial Mode is enabled, false otherwise.
Only works on CLS and official levels.
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_ISSTARTED: Displays false if not started, or true if started by pressing any key
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_LELP: Lenient Early Perfect + Lenient Late Perfect
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_LEVELNAMETEXT: The name text displayed at the top of the level.
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_LEVELNAMETEXTCOLOR: The color of the text displayed at the top of the level.
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_LEVELNAMETEXTRAW: The name text displayed at the top of the level. (with rich tags)
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_LEVELNAMETEXTSHADOW: The shadow color of the text displayed at the top of the level.
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_MARGINCOMBO:
Displays the combo for a single judgment
(ex: {MarginCombo:VeryLate})
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_MARGINCOMBOS:
Displays all combos for multiple judgments
(ex: {MarginCombos:VeryLate|VeryEarly})
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_MARGINMAXCOMBO:
Displays the maximum combo for a single judgment
(ex: {MarginMaxCombo:VeryLate})
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_MARGINMAXCOMBOS:
Displays all maximum combos for multiple judgments
(ex: {MarginMaxCombos:VeryLate|VeryEarly})
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_MAXACCURACY: The highest achievable Accuracy in the current tile
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_MAXXACCURACY: The highest achievable XAccuracy in the current tile
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_MOVINGMAN: You can animate text on criterion certain tags. Used with <size>.
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_MULTIPRESSCOUNTER: The percentage of the multipress gauge.
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_MULTIPRESSCOUNTERRAW: The raw internal value of the multipress gauge in the game.
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_NELP: Normal Early Perfect + Normal Late Perfect
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_NT: Normal Too Early + Normal Too Late
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_NV: Normal Very Early + Normal Very Late
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_OELP: Official Early Perfect + Official Late Perfect
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_OT: Official Too Early + Official Too Late
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_OV: Official Very Early + Official Very Late
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_OVERLOADCOUNTER: The percentage of the overload gauge.
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_OVERLOADCOUNTERRAW: The raw internal value of the overload gauge in the game.
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_PITCH: Speed set in CLS (displayed as 1 when at 1x speed)
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_SELP: Strict Early Perfect + Strict Late Perfect
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_SPECIALPLAYMARK:
Displays a special mark based on your play performance:
PP = perfect  FC+ = no miss
FC = full combo  XX = no special mark
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_ST: Strict Too Early + Strict Too Late
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_SV: Strict Very Early + Strict Very Late
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_TILEANGLE: The angle of the current tile
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_TILEENTRYANGLE: Indicates the entry angle from the entry tile to the current tile.
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_TILEEXITANGLE: Indicates the exit angle from the current tile to the next tile.
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_TIMING: Error range showing the timing of keystrokes in ms from the center of the tile
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_TITLERAW: Title of the song (with rich tags)
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_UNITYMEMUSAGE: Shows the total memory used by Unity, not including the entire process memory
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_UNITYMEMUSAGEGB: Shows the total memory used by Unity in GB, not including the entire process memory
ru-RU.TOOLTIP_UNITYMEMUSAGEKB: Shows the total memory used by Unity in KB, not including the entire process memory
ru-RU.UPDATE_RATE_LIMITED: Update or Version check Rate Limited!
ru-RU.UPDATER_INFO_JSON_NOT_FOUND: info.json not found in the update package
ru-RU.UPDATER_SAME_VERSION_DETECTED: Update package version matches the current version
ru-RU.UPDATER_VERSION_CHECK_ERROR: Version parse or asset fetch failed
